identity.name: Ryan Laird
identity.headline: Director of Green Orbit Digital | Sustainable Marketing for the Space Sector

summary.ats: Communications and marketing professional with over a decade of experience in the space sector, specialising in sustainable marketing, science communication, and data-driven digital strategy. Chartered Marketer (CMktr) with expertise spanning SEO, content strategy, and space industry communications across ESA-related programmes, research initiatives, and commercial space organisations.
summary.human: I work at the intersection of space, sustainability, and communication—helping organisations translate complex technical ideas into clear, impactful narratives. With a background in physics and astrophysics and over a decade in the space sector, I focus on building strategies that connect science, industry, and public engagement through thoughtful, data-informed marketing.

focus_areas: Digital growth strategy for B2B space organisations
Earth observation and climate services communication
